message:
🐛 Fix sparkline direction + add clickable widget dots (#1114)

- Sparkline chart now shows newest-left matching run history dots
  (removed .reverse() that caused opposite direction)
- Updated gradient color and largest-dot indicator to index 0
- Added "new" / "old" X-axis labels to sparkline
- Widget dots are now clickable <a> links to GitHub Actions runs
- Added hover tooltips on widget dots (status + time ago)
- Guide acronyms link to workflow page
- Row hover shows guide stats (pass rate, failures, last run)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
